markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting between School AI and GrowthX to discuss content marketing partnership and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [School AI recently closed Series A funding and is looking to accelerate organic growth to catch up with competitors](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Primary focus is on demand capture in a rapidly evolving market, with some demand generation](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [Target audience spans K-20 education, including teachers, administrators, and technology directors](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=538.0)
  - [Content strategy will need to balance addressing AI apprehension in education with showcasing innovative use cases](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)

## Topics

### Company Background and Goals

  - [School AI closed Series A funding recently](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=2235.0)
  - [Aiming to become category leader in AI for education](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=2247.0)
  - [Currently behind competitors in organic traffic, backlinks, domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=2211.0)
  - [80% of new users come through organic channels currently](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=2200.0)
  - [Focused on generating pipeline and closed-won ARR, not vanity metrics](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=2009.0)

### Target Audience and Positioning

  - [Users span K-20 education (kindergarten through PhD)](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=2423.0)
  - [Primary users are teachers across all levels](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=2446.0)
  - [Buyers include administrators, tech directors, instructional coaches, librarians](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=2478.0)
  - [Positioning as end-to-end platform for personalized learning, differentiating from competitors focused on teacher productivity or browser extensions](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=2622.0)

### Content Strategy Approach

  - [Balance between demand capture (60%) and demand generation (40%)](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=2552.0)
  - [Need to address spectrum of AI adoption in education - from skepticism to enthusiasm](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=2558.0)
  - [Opportunity to leverage user-generated content and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=3175.0)
  - [Potential to create content tied to School AI's training courses](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=3080.0)
  - [Focus on differentiating School AI's comprehensive platform capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=2634.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Primary competitors are Magic School and Brisk](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
  - [Magic School strong in teacher productivity use cases](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=2612.0)
  - [School AI aims to showcase broader, more innovative classroom applications](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=2692.0)

### Collaboration Process

  - [GrowthX to provide initial content opportunities and strategy for review](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
  - [School AI to share existing resources like tone/voice guidelines and training materials](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=3530.0)
  - [Need to determine internal review process as content production ramps up](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=3360.0)

## Next Steps

  - [School AI to provide access to analytics, search console, call recordings, sales decks](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=3582.0)
  - [GrowthX to build initial content opportunity set in Airtable for review](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=3632.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up to review and refine content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=3643.0)
  - [GrowthX to create initial calibration articles for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=3660.0)
  - [Aim to ramp up content volume around week 4 of engagement](https://fathom.video/share/7QQwfm8s8sSKQRQ3gFydXih_M473ZGEw?tab=summary&timestamp=3674.0)
